title: Expand runtime-discipline audit automation for v3.1
description: Broaden runtime-discipline beyond baseline-complete negative and positive paths by adding lower-cost audit paths, stronger audit automation, and additional replayable failure families before v3.1.0.
triage_notes: Runtime-discipline audit automation now includes three replayable RD-002 broken-chain families plus machine-readable RD-004 audit note, packet, reconstruction map, audit index, audit gate, and audit shortcut artifacts. The bounded-manual-review shortcut is recorded in the latest self-hosting run and normalized by the runtime-discipline family register, so remaining diagnosis/outcome expansion is no longer a v3.1 runtime-discipline release blocker.
